# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Description: AWS CloudFormation example for EC2 instance with EBS volume

Resources:
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-0abcdef1234567890
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      KeyName: myKeyPair
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sda1
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 30
            DeleteOnTermination: true
            VolumeType: gp3

  MyEBSVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      Size: 100
      AvailabilityZone: 
        Fn::Select: 
          - 0 
          - Fn::GetAZs: ""
      
  MyEC2EBSAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      InstanceId: 
        Ref: MyEC2Instance
      VolumeId: 
        Ref: MyEBSVolume
      Device: /dev/sdf
